dashboardBody.Fn::Sub: { "widgets": [ { "height": 6, "width": 6, "y": 0, "x": 0, "type": "metric", "properties": { "metrics": [ [ "ecommerce", "OrdersCreated${Env}", { "region": "${PrimaryRegion}" } ] ], "view": "timeSeries", "stacked": false, "region": "${PrimaryRegion}", "title": "OrdersCreated-${PrimaryRegion}", "period": 60, "stat": "Sum" } }, { "height": 6, "width": 6, "y": 6, "x": 0, "type": "metric", "properties": { "metrics": [ [ "ecommerce", "OrdersCreated${Env}", { "region": "${SecondaryRegion}" } ] ], "view": "timeSeries", "stacked": false, "region": "${PrimaryRegion}", "title": "OrdersCreated-${SecondaryRegion}", "period": 60, "stat": "Sum" } }, { "height": 6, "width": 8, "y": 0, "x": 6, "type": "metric", "properties": { "metrics": [ [ "AWS/DynamoDB", "ReplicationLatency", "TableName", "cartsTable${Env}", "ReceivingRegion", "${SecondaryRegion}", { "region": "${PrimaryRegion}" } ] ], "view": "timeSeries", "stacked": false, "region": "${PrimaryRegion}", "period": 1, "stat": "p99", "title": "Carts DDB Replication Latency to ${SecondaryRegion}" } }, { "height": 6, "width": 10, "y": 0, "x": 14, "type": "metric", "properties": { "metrics": [ [ "AWS/Lambda", "Invocations" ], [ ".", "Throttles" ], [ ".", "Duration" ], [ ".", "ConcurrentExecutions" ], [ ".", "ClaimedAccountConcurrency" ], [ ".", "Errors" ] ], "view": "timeSeries", "stacked": false, "region": "${PrimaryRegion}", "stat": "p99", "period": 60, "title": "Lambda Metrics - ${PrimaryRegion}" } }, { "height": 6, "width": 10, "y": 6, "x": 14, "type": "metric", "properties": { "metrics": [ [ "AWS/Lambda", "Invocations" ], [ ".", "Throttles" ], [ ".", "Duration" ], [ ".", "ConcurrentExecutions" ], [ ".", "ClaimedAccountConcurrency" ], [ ".", "Errors" ] ], "view": "timeSeries", "stacked": false, "region": "${SecondaryRegion}", "stat": "p99", "period": 60, "title": "Lambda Metrics - ${SecondaryRegion}" } } ] }
